TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == TOYOTA kazizeng a kusi "kamu nu Zipun,„Éą„É®„āŅkazizengÔľŹ„Éą„É®„āŅ„Āė„Ā©„ĀÜ„Āó„āÉ Toyota JidŇćsha */?,kamu nu Ing, Toyota Motor Corporation", TOYOTA han ku nganga "„Éą„É®„āŅ,TOYOTA" u milakiitay tu kanatal kazizeng a kusi nu Zipun, TOYOTA sa nu lince "LEXUS", Ta-ba "Daihatsu" atu ze-ye "HINO" nuyaayan a kusi, i 20% a ku-ben mala supalu nu tabakiay a kadum. Toyota JidŇćsha */?,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Toyota Motor Corporation),Áį°Á®ĪŤĪźÁĒį(„Éą„É®„āŅ,TOYOTA) (LEXUS),Ś§ßÁôľ(Daihatsu)ŚŹäśó•ťáé(HINO)ŚďĀÁČĆÁöĄśĮćŚÖ¨ŚŹł,šł¶šĽ•20% . nilaculan likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ pipatizengan ŚČĶÁęčŚąĚśúü TOYOTA kzizeng i 1933 a mihca 9 a bulad namakay patizengay a tademaw ci TOYOTA-cow-ci i 1926 a mihcaan a nipatizeng tu TOYOTA lunuk sanay tu misadawaay a kikay a nipatizeng, pakayni nipatahkalan a kamu nu wawa ni TOYOTA cuw-ci ci TOYOTA-tyen si i-lang, saayaway a se-cang u mikadabuay ku situngusay ci TOYOTA-li-san-lang ku situngusay. TOYOTA a kazizeng makay nisanga'an tu misadawaay a kikay, micunusay tu kawaw a kikay a nalimaan, i 1935 a mihcaan misanga' tu saayaway uyza dada' ku nisanga'an a kazizeng "TOYOTA AA" i 1935 a mihca 9 a bulad 25 a mihcaan, TOYOTA lunuk sanay a misadawaay a kikay tungus nu kazizengay Zipun a nganganan "„Éą„É® Toyoda" sumad han tu „Éą„É®„āŅ "Toyota". "ŤĪźÁĒįAA".1936ŚĻī9śúą25śó•, "„Éą„É®„ÉÄ"(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)". 1937 a mihca 8 a bulad 28 a demiad, Toyota sunuk sanay nu misadawaay a kikay, misatekeday a kazizengan u "Toyuta sunuk sanay a kazizeng kusi", macukel nu cenbu nu Zipun, u sapususul tayaway a azaw nu tuud atu kalisiw. sakatus a kalalais, kanahatu Toyota u kazizeng nu hitay nu Zipun anganngan u sapawapen tu patiyamay, angangan u nisanga'an tu tulaku nu hitay, i ti-tu nu Amelika u "Toyota kazizeng a kusi" caay ku kahenulan a kakitizaan nu Amelika. 1937ŚĻī8śúą28śó•, , nipaliayaw nu Amelika i 1945 a mihca 8 a bulad 21 a demiad mabadakuwang matuduh ku Toyuta a baci, Wi-caw-he atu hungti paliayaw i 8 a bulad 15 a demiad musakamu nai' ku nisalunguc makai tu milais sa, sakasa payawan iza ku mapeciy, nuzumaay Toyuta a kusi caay kapeci'. 1936 a mihca 9 a bulad 25 a demiad, Toyota sunuk sanay misanga'ay tu dawa kazizengay a nganganan nu Zipun mitukulicay a "Toyuta sunuk a kazizengan a kusi" „É®„ÉÄ "Toyoda" nisumad u "„Éą„É®„āŅToyota han". ""„Éą„É®„ÉÄ(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)".1936ŚĻī9śúą25śó•, ""„Éą„É®„ÉÄ(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)". makayza 1950 a mihcaan a nakatalawan, Toyota tatenga' patizeng mahiza "misumad", "Just-in-time ku nisanga'an" "piazihan" atu nipisanga' tu Toyota, nalimaan misiwbay, amalingatu pacakay, caay ku niida tu kalisiw nu gingku dada', misaicelang amisayadah tu nu uzipay a kalisiw, ayza mala u nayi'ay ku nicaliw tu kalisiw amisiwbayay a kusi. ","Just-in-time . uyza labu nu Toyota taneng tu ku nisuped tu kalisiw, singangan tu Toyota ginghku. Duduc tu 2002 a mihcaan ku nipaasip, Toyota sa u saayaway nu Zipun a kusi nisiwbanay tu mihcaan malakii' tu cacay ecaw ku Zipunay a kalisiw. i 2004 a mihcaan ku nipulu a niasipanay, u nu saayaway a kusi nu Zipu u liwan nu mihcaan "u tatungusa a niasip nu Amelik" malakii' tu cacay acaw ku nu Zipun a kalisiw. . makay 1950 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan a kakapah ku tuud. patinaku panan nu kazizeng atu zikuz a haku nu kazizeng u sawawh saedeb a panan, salaed tu sunian, sakay tuyni amiazihay tu aca. madayum a masapinang maazih ku kapahay a tuud. Toyota lalid sa amisakapah tu nalimaan, zuma matineng aca adidi' ku kalisiw amisanga' tu malecaday a kakapah ku nalimaan misanga' tu tuud, nisanga'an a kazizeng hina masakamu u cayay kakucang. palalecad tu zuma a kusi nu kazizeng, uyza u Toyota miazih mihapinang ku nipasanga' u baluhay a nalumaan, hin a masakamuay nu hekalay u "mikilulay nu bali", mihaymaw ku wayway" atu "minanam tu kapahay nu tau micunus tu azaaw nu uzip". miazih tu 1960 a mihcaan tu sakatusa a ziday a Corona, katuuday a tademaw tu sakay cacayay a nisanga'an tu nikalatu' nu udip nu kazizeng, atu u nikamu caay kanamuh tu nu cayuay a simal, azih tuToyota hicaen patubeli tu nu uzipay a nisanga'an tu balihay a nalimaan. ". Corona , . mapalawpes tu 6 a mihcaan migingkiw, i 1962 a mihcaan pacakay tu 700cc adidi'ay nu katuuday a kazizeng, saayaway a Publica, sakay amatatungus ku nizatengan, amayasuy kuaca nu kazizeng atu keyzay a nipiseki tu mahiniay a kazizengan. nika lalid sa mapacakay nu micakayay "macakayay tu, mateketekes kapah tu" mahini ku nizateng, caay kakapah ku nipacaay. makay tu pipudac nu kusi tu caay kakapah ku nipacakay tu kazizeng, atu nilacul tu laziw atu akuti'ay a sinpuki, kya macakat ku nipacakay. pakay tuyni a kawaw, katuku 80 ku nizateng nu Toyota kya a teneng. 700cc Publica, .. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tojota kaziz…ôŇč a kusi "kamu nu zipun,***kaziz…ôŇč********* tojota *id*sńßa */?,kamu nu iŇč, tojota motor ¶orporation", tojota ńßan ku ŇčaŇča "***,tojota" u mir~…ĺakiitaj tu kanatar~…ĺ kaziz…ôŇč a kusi nu zipun, tojota sa nu r~…ĺin ¶…ô "r~…ĺ…ô*us", ta-ba "daińßatsu" atu z…ô-j…ô "ńßino" nujaajan a kusi, i **% a ku-b…ôn mar~…ĺa supar~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a kadum. tojota *id*sńßa */?,**:tojota motor ¶orporation),****(***,tojota) (r~…ĺ…ô*us),**(daińßatsu)***(ńßino)******,****% . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺikisi ** pipatiz…ôŇčan **** tojota kziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad namakaj patiz…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i tojota- ¶ow- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶aan a nipatiz…ôŇč tu tojota r~…ĺunuk sanaj tu misadawaaj a kikaj a nipatiz…ôŇč, pakajni nipatańßkar~…ĺan a kamu nu wawa ni tojota ¶uw- ¶i ¶i tojota-tj…ôn si i-r~…ĺaŇč, saajawaj a s…ô- ¶aŇč u mikadabuaj ku situŇčusaj ¶i tojota-r~…ĺi-san-r~…ĺaŇč ku situŇčusaj. tojota a kaziz…ôŇč makaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu misadawaaj a kikaj, mi ¶unusaj tu kawaw a kikaj a nar~…ĺimaan, i **** a mińß ¶aan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu saajawaj ujza dada Ē~ ° ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kaziz…ôŇč "tojota aa" i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß ¶aan, tojota r~…ĺunuk sanaj a misadawaaj a kikaj tuŇčus nu kaziz…ôŇčaj zipun a ŇčaŇčanan "** tojoda" sumad ńßan tu *** "tojota". "**aa".**********, "***"(tojoda)***"***(tojota)". **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tojota sunuk sanaj nu misadawaaj a kikaj, misat…ôk…ôdaj a kaziz…ôŇčan u "tojuta sunuk sanaj a kaziz…ôŇč kusi", ma ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nu ¶…ônbu nu zipun, u sapususur~…ĺ tajawaj a azaw nu tuud atu kar~…ĺisiw. sakatus a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, kanańßatu tojota u kaziz…ôŇč nu ńßitaj nu zipun aŇčanŇčan u sapawap…ôn tu patijamaj, aŇčaŇčan u nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tur~…ĺaku nu ńßitaj, i ti-tu nu am…ôr~…ĺika u "tojota kaziz…ôŇč a kusi" ¶aaj ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kakitizaan nu am…ôr~…ĺika. **********, , nipar~…ĺiajaw nu am…ôr~…ĺika i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mabadakuwaŇč matuduńß ku tojuta a ba ¶i, wi- ¶aw-ńß…ô atu ńßuŇčti par~…ĺiajaw i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad musakamu nai Ē~ ° ku nisar~…ĺuŇču ¶ makai tu mir~…ĺais sa, sakasa pajawan iza ku map…ô ¶ij, nuzumaaj tojuta a kusi ¶aaj kap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tojota sunuk sanaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu dawa kaziz…ôŇčaj a ŇčaŇčanan nu zipun mitukur~…ĺi ¶aj a "tojuta sunuk a kaziz…ôŇčan a kusi" ** "tojoda" nisumad u "***tojota ńßan". ""***(tojoda)***"***(tojota)".**********, ""***(tojoda)***"***(tojota)". makajza **** a mińß ¶aan a nakatar~…ĺawan, tojota tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč mańßiza "misumad", "*ust-in-tim…ô ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an" "piazińßan" atu nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu tojota, nar~…ĺimaan misiwbaj, amar~…ĺiŇčatu pa ¶akaj, ¶aaj ku niida tu kar~…ĺisiw nu giŇčku dada Ē~ °, misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amisajadańß tu nu uzipaj a kar~…ĺisiw, ajza mar~…ĺa u naji Ē~ °aj ku ni ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kar~…ĺisiw amisiwbajaj a kusi. ","*ust-in-tim…ô . ujza r~…ĺabu nu tojota tan…ôŇč tu ku nisup…ôd tu kar~…ĺisiw, siŇčaŇčan tu tojota giŇčńßku. dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan ku nipaasip, tojota sa u saajawaj nu zipun a kusi nisiwbanaj tu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj …ô ¶aw ku zipunaj a kar~…ĺisiw. i **** a mińß ¶aan ku nipur~…ĺu a niasipanaj, u nu saajawaj a kusi nu zipu u r~…ĺiwan nu mińß ¶aan "u tatuŇčusa a niasip nu am…ôr~…ĺik" mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj a ¶aw ku nu zipun a kar~…ĺisiw. . makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan a kakapańß ku tuud. patinaku panan nu kaziz…ôŇč atu zikuz a ńßaku nu kaziz…ôŇč u sawawńß sa…ôd…ôb a panan, sar~…ĺa…ôd tu sunian, sakaj tujni amiazińßaj tu a ¶a. madajum a masapinaŇč maazińß ku kapańßaj a tuud. tojota r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa amisakapańß tu nar~…ĺimaan, zuma matin…ôŇč a ¶a adidi Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw amisaŇča Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kakapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu tuud, nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kaziz…ôŇč ńßina masakamu u ¶ajaj kaku ¶aŇč. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu zuma a kusi nu kaziz…ôŇč, ujza u tojota miazińß mińßapinaŇč ku nipasaŇča Ē~ ° u bar~…ĺuńßaj a nar~…ĺumaan, ńßin a masakamuaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj u "mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺi", mińßajmaw ku wajwaj" atu "minanam tu kapańßaj nu tau mi ¶unus tu azaaw nu uzip". miazińß tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu sakatusa a zidaj a ¶orona, katuudaj a tad…ômaw tu sakaj ¶a ¶ajaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikar~…ĺatu Ē~ ° nu udip nu kaziz…ôŇč, atu u nikamu ¶aaj kanamuńß tu nu ¶ajuaj a simar~…ĺ, azińß tutojota ńßi ¶a…ôn patub…ôr~…ĺi tu nu uzipaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu bar~…ĺińßaj a nar~…ĺimaan. ". ¶orona , . mapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu * a mińß ¶aan migiŇčkiw, i **** a mińß ¶aan pa ¶akaj tu *** ¶ ¶ adidi Ē~ °aj nu katuudaj a kaziz…ôŇč, saajawaj a pubr~…ĺi ¶a, sakaj amatatuŇčus ku nizat…ôŇčan, amajasuj kua ¶a nu kaziz…ôŇč atu k…ôzaj a nipis…ôki tu mańßiniaj a kaziz…ôŇčan. nika r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mapa ¶akaj nu mi ¶akajaj "ma ¶akajaj tu, mat…ôk…ôt…ôk…ôs kapańß tu" mańßini ku nizat…ôŇč, ¶aaj kakapańß ku nipa ¶aaj. makaj tu pipuda ¶ nu kusi tu ¶aaj kakapańß ku nipa ¶akaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, atu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaziw atu akuti Ē~ °aj a sinpuki, kja ma ¶akat ku nipa ¶akaj. pakaj tujni a kawaw, katuku ** ku nizat…ôŇč nu tojota kja a t…ôn…ôŇč. *** ¶ ¶ pubr~…ĺi ¶a, .. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == TOYOTA kazizeng a kusi "kamu nu Zipun,„Éą„É®„āŅkazizengÔľŹ„Éą„É®„āŅ„Āė„Ā©„ĀÜ„Āó„āÉ Toyota JidŇćsha */?,kamu nu Ing, Toyota Motor Corporation", TOYOTA han ku nganga "„Éą„É®„āŅ,TOYOTA" u milakiitay tu kanatal kazizeng a kusi nu Zipun, TOYOTA sa nu lince "LEXUS", Ta-ba "Daihatsu" atu ze-ye "HINO" nuyaayan a kusi, i 20% a ku-ben mala supalu nu tabakiay a kadum. Toyota JidŇćsha */?,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Toyota Motor Corporation),Áį°Á®ĪŤĪźÁĒį(„Éą„É®„āŅ,TOYOTA) (LEXUS),Ś§ßÁôľ(Daihatsu)ŚŹäśó•ťáé(HINO)ŚďĀÁČĆÁöĄśĮćŚÖ¨ŚŹł,šł¶šĽ•20% . nilaculan likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ pipatizengan ŚČĶÁęčŚąĚśúü TOYOTA kzizeng i 1933 a mihca 9 a bulad namakay patizengay a tademaw ci TOYOTA-cow-ci i 1926 a mihcaan a nipatizeng tu TOYOTA lunuk sanay tu misadawaay a kikay a nipatizeng, pakayni nipatahkalan a kamu nu wawa ni TOYOTA cuw-ci ci TOYOTA-tyen si i-lang, saayaway a se-cang u mikadabuay ku situngusay ci TOYOTA-li-san-lang ku situngusay. TOYOTA a kazizeng makay nisanga'an tu misadawaay a kikay, micunusay tu kawaw a kikay a nalimaan, i 1935 a mihcaan misanga' tu saayaway uyza dada' ku nisanga'an a kazizeng "TOYOTA AA" i 1935 a mihca 9 a bulad 25 a mihcaan, TOYOTA lunuk sanay a misadawaay a kikay tungus nu kazizengay Zipun a nganganan "„Éą„É® Toyoda" sumad han tu „Éą„É®„āŅ "Toyota". "ŤĪźÁĒįAA".1936ŚĻī9śúą25śó•, "„Éą„É®„ÉÄ"(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)". 1937 a mihca 8 a bulad 28 a demiad, Toyota sunuk sanay nu misadawaay a kikay, misatekeday a kazizengan u "Toyuta sunuk sanay a kazizeng kusi", macukel nu cenbu nu Zipun, u sapususul tayaway a azaw nu tuud atu kalisiw. sakatus a kalalais, kanahatu Toyota u kazizeng nu hitay nu Zipun anganngan u sapawapen tu patiyamay, angangan u nisanga'an tu tulaku nu hitay, i ti-tu nu Amelika u "Toyota kazizeng a kusi" caay ku kahenulan a kakitizaan nu Amelika. 1937ŚĻī8śúą28śó•, , nipaliayaw nu Amelika i 1945 a mihca 8 a bulad 21 a demiad mabadakuwang matuduh ku Toyuta a baci, Wi-caw-he atu hungti paliayaw i 8 a bulad 15 a demiad musakamu nai' ku nisalunguc makai tu milais sa, sakasa payawan iza ku mapeciy, nuzumaay Toyuta a kusi caay kapeci'. 1936 a mihca 9 a bulad 25 a demiad, Toyota sunuk sanay misanga'ay tu dawa kazizengay a nganganan nu Zipun mitukulicay a "Toyuta sunuk a kazizengan a kusi" „É®„ÉÄ "Toyoda" nisumad u "„Éą„É®„āŅToyota han". ""„Éą„É®„ÉÄ(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)".1936ŚĻī9śúą25śó•, ""„Éą„É®„ÉÄ(Toyoda)Ť™ŅśēīÁāļ"„Éą„É®„āŅ(Toyota)". makayza 1950 a mihcaan a nakatalawan, Toyota tatenga' patizeng mahiza "misumad", "Just-in-time ku nisanga'an" "piazihan" atu nipisanga' tu Toyota, nalimaan misiwbay, amalingatu pacakay, caay ku niida tu kalisiw nu gingku dada', misaicelang amisayadah tu nu uzipay a kalisiw, ayza mala u nayi'ay ku nicaliw tu kalisiw amisiwbayay a kusi. ","Just-in-time . uyza labu nu Toyota taneng tu ku nisuped tu kalisiw, singangan tu Toyota ginghku. Duduc tu 2002 a mihcaan ku nipaasip, Toyota sa u saayaway nu Zipun a kusi nisiwbanay tu mihcaan malakii' tu cacay ecaw ku Zipunay a kalisiw. i 2004 a mihcaan ku nipulu a niasipanay, u nu saayaway a kusi nu Zipu u liwan nu mihcaan "u tatungusa a niasip nu Amelik" malakii' tu cacay acaw ku nu Zipun a kalisiw. . makay 1950 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan a kakapah ku tuud. patinaku panan nu kazizeng atu zikuz a haku nu kazizeng u sawawh saedeb a panan, salaed tu sunian, sakay tuyni amiazihay tu aca. madayum a masapinang maazih ku kapahay a tuud. Toyota lalid sa amisakapah tu nalimaan, zuma matineng aca adidi' ku kalisiw amisanga' tu malecaday a kakapah ku nalimaan misanga' tu tuud, nisanga'an a kazizeng hina masakamu u cayay kakucang. palalecad tu zuma a kusi nu kazizeng, uyza u Toyota miazih mihapinang ku nipasanga' u baluhay a nalumaan, hin a masakamuay nu hekalay u "mikilulay nu bali", mihaymaw ku wayway" atu "minanam tu kapahay nu tau micunus tu azaaw nu uzip". miazih tu 1960 a mihcaan tu sakatusa a ziday a Corona, katuuday a tademaw tu sakay cacayay a nisanga'an tu nikalatu' nu udip nu kazizeng, atu u nikamu caay kanamuh tu nu cayuay a simal, azih tuToyota hicaen patubeli tu nu uzipay a nisanga'an tu balihay a nalimaan. ". Corona , . mapalawpes tu 6 a mihcaan migingkiw, i 1962 a mihcaan pacakay tu 700cc adidi'ay nu katuuday a kazizeng, saayaway a Publica, sakay amatatungus ku nizatengan, amayasuy kuaca nu kazizeng atu keyzay a nipiseki tu mahiniay a kazizengan. nika lalid sa mapacakay nu micakayay "macakayay tu, mateketekes kapah tu" mahini ku nizateng, caay kakapah ku nipacaay. makay tu pipudac nu kusi tu caay kakapah ku nipacakay tu kazizeng, atu nilacul tu laziw atu akuti'ay a sinpuki, kya macakat ku nipacakay. pakay tuyni a kawaw, katuku 80 ku nizateng nu Toyota kya a teneng. 700cc Publica, .. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tojota kaziz…ôŇč a kusi "kamu nu zipun,***kaziz…ôŇč********* tojota *id*sńßa */?,kamu nu iŇč, tojota motor ¶orporation", tojota ńßan ku ŇčaŇča "***,tojota" u mir~…ĺakiitaj tu kanatar~…ĺ kaziz…ôŇč a kusi nu zipun, tojota sa nu r~…ĺin ¶…ô "r~…ĺ…ô*us", ta-ba "daińßatsu" atu z…ô-j…ô "ńßino" nujaajan a kusi, i **% a ku-b…ôn mar~…ĺa supar~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a kadum. tojota *id*sńßa */?,**:tojota motor ¶orporation),****(***,tojota) (r~…ĺ…ô*us),**(daińßatsu)***(ńßino)******,****% . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺikisi ** pipatiz…ôŇčan **** tojota kziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad namakaj patiz…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i tojota- ¶ow- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶aan a nipatiz…ôŇč tu tojota r~…ĺunuk sanaj tu misadawaaj a kikaj a nipatiz…ôŇč, pakajni nipatańßkar~…ĺan a kamu nu wawa ni tojota ¶uw- ¶i ¶i tojota-tj…ôn si i-r~…ĺaŇč, saajawaj a s…ô- ¶aŇč u mikadabuaj ku situŇčusaj ¶i tojota-r~…ĺi-san-r~…ĺaŇč ku situŇčusaj. tojota a kaziz…ôŇč makaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu misadawaaj a kikaj, mi ¶unusaj tu kawaw a kikaj a nar~…ĺimaan, i **** a mińß ¶aan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu saajawaj ujza dada Ē~ ° ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kaziz…ôŇč "tojota aa" i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß ¶aan, tojota r~…ĺunuk sanaj a misadawaaj a kikaj tuŇčus nu kaziz…ôŇčaj zipun a ŇčaŇčanan "** tojoda" sumad ńßan tu *** "tojota". "**aa".**********, "***"(tojoda)***"***(tojota)". **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tojota sunuk sanaj nu misadawaaj a kikaj, misat…ôk…ôdaj a kaziz…ôŇčan u "tojuta sunuk sanaj a kaziz…ôŇč kusi", ma ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nu ¶…ônbu nu zipun, u sapususur~…ĺ tajawaj a azaw nu tuud atu kar~…ĺisiw. sakatus a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, kanańßatu tojota u kaziz…ôŇč nu ńßitaj nu zipun aŇčanŇčan u sapawap…ôn tu patijamaj, aŇčaŇčan u nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tur~…ĺaku nu ńßitaj, i ti-tu nu am…ôr~…ĺika u "tojota kaziz…ôŇč a kusi" ¶aaj ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kakitizaan nu am…ôr~…ĺika. **********, , nipar~…ĺiajaw nu am…ôr~…ĺika i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mabadakuwaŇč matuduńß ku tojuta a ba ¶i, wi- ¶aw-ńß…ô atu ńßuŇčti par~…ĺiajaw i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad musakamu nai Ē~ ° ku nisar~…ĺuŇču ¶ makai tu mir~…ĺais sa, sakasa pajawan iza ku map…ô ¶ij, nuzumaaj tojuta a kusi ¶aaj kap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tojota sunuk sanaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu dawa kaziz…ôŇčaj a ŇčaŇčanan nu zipun mitukur~…ĺi ¶aj a "tojuta sunuk a kaziz…ôŇčan a kusi" ** "tojoda" nisumad u "***tojota ńßan". ""***(tojoda)***"***(tojota)".**********, ""***(tojoda)***"***(tojota)". makajza **** a mińß ¶aan a nakatar~…ĺawan, tojota tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč mańßiza "misumad", "*ust-in-tim…ô ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an" "piazińßan" atu nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu tojota, nar~…ĺimaan misiwbaj, amar~…ĺiŇčatu pa ¶akaj, ¶aaj ku niida tu kar~…ĺisiw nu giŇčku dada Ē~ °, misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amisajadańß tu nu uzipaj a kar~…ĺisiw, ajza mar~…ĺa u naji Ē~ °aj ku ni ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kar~…ĺisiw amisiwbajaj a kusi. ","*ust-in-tim…ô . ujza r~…ĺabu nu tojota tan…ôŇč tu ku nisup…ôd tu kar~…ĺisiw, siŇčaŇčan tu tojota giŇčńßku. dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan ku nipaasip, tojota sa u saajawaj nu zipun a kusi nisiwbanaj tu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj …ô ¶aw ku zipunaj a kar~…ĺisiw. i **** a mińß ¶aan ku nipur~…ĺu a niasipanaj, u nu saajawaj a kusi nu zipu u r~…ĺiwan nu mińß ¶aan "u tatuŇčusa a niasip nu am…ôr~…ĺik" mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj a ¶aw ku nu zipun a kar~…ĺisiw. . makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan a kakapańß ku tuud. patinaku panan nu kaziz…ôŇč atu zikuz a ńßaku nu kaziz…ôŇč u sawawńß sa…ôd…ôb a panan, sar~…ĺa…ôd tu sunian, sakaj tujni amiazińßaj tu a ¶a. madajum a masapinaŇč maazińß ku kapańßaj a tuud. tojota r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa amisakapańß tu nar~…ĺimaan, zuma matin…ôŇč a ¶a adidi Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw amisaŇča Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kakapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu tuud, nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kaziz…ôŇč ńßina masakamu u ¶ajaj kaku ¶aŇč. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu zuma a kusi nu kaziz…ôŇč, ujza u tojota miazińß mińßapinaŇč ku nipasaŇča Ē~ ° u bar~…ĺuńßaj a nar~…ĺumaan, ńßin a masakamuaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj u "mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺi", mińßajmaw ku wajwaj" atu "minanam tu kapańßaj nu tau mi ¶unus tu azaaw nu uzip". miazińß tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu sakatusa a zidaj a ¶orona, katuudaj a tad…ômaw tu sakaj ¶a ¶ajaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikar~…ĺatu Ē~ ° nu udip nu kaziz…ôŇč, atu u nikamu ¶aaj kanamuńß tu nu ¶ajuaj a simar~…ĺ, azińß tutojota ńßi ¶a…ôn patub…ôr~…ĺi tu nu uzipaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu bar~…ĺińßaj a nar~…ĺimaan. ". ¶orona , . mapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu * a mińß ¶aan migiŇčkiw, i **** a mińß ¶aan pa ¶akaj tu *** ¶ ¶ adidi Ē~ °aj nu katuudaj a kaziz…ôŇč, saajawaj a pubr~…ĺi ¶a, sakaj amatatuŇčus ku nizat…ôŇčan, amajasuj kua ¶a nu kaziz…ôŇč atu k…ôzaj a nipis…ôki tu mańßiniaj a kaziz…ôŇčan. nika r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mapa ¶akaj nu mi ¶akajaj "ma ¶akajaj tu, mat…ôk…ôt…ôk…ôs kapańß tu" mańßini ku nizat…ôŇč, ¶aaj kakapańß ku nipa ¶aaj. makaj tu pipuda ¶ nu kusi tu ¶aaj kakapańß ku nipa ¶akaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, atu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaziw atu akuti Ē~ °aj a sinpuki, kja ma ¶akat ku nipa ¶akaj. pakaj tujni a kawaw, katuku ** ku nizat…ôŇč nu tojota kja a t…ôn…ôŇč. *** ¶ ¶ pubr~…ĺi ¶a, .. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
